reviews.text: Well... I had found that there is a online institute called EDUS ONLINE INSTITUTE. Actually after joining this class there is more improvement in my studies. I got higher marks  in school. And also it is a really great choice for whom who like to don't go out for classes like me. The teachers are very kind and good at teaching also the Edus workers like coordinator, HOA, Admin whenever I need help they help me within no time. I really like to study in Edus. And I hope they will be doing great works in the future. May the lord bless them all. 🤍💙 I have gone to many courses for spoken Sinhala and spoken English but only after joining edus only I can fluently speak English and Sinhala 💙🤍

Edus online institution has become my biggest supporter in learning tamil language.
I was a student who studied my primarys in an international school, and currently studying in an government school, so my first language was English and I was very nervous about studying in tamil but after the support given by edus I've started to love learning tamil.🤩
And also the plus point in my learning journey with edus is if I miss the class I can catch up with their clear recordings they provide and also they make learning more fun by giving us quiz and prizes as well as very friendly tutors to learn with. 😊
Thanks you so much edus for the support your team gave to make my learning more enjoyable ❤️

Edus is a best online institute for every single students.
We can see our improvement very quickly in there.
Now our Edus is step into it's sixth year.
So very very congratulations for that.
Please keep doing this work for our future generations too.
Thank you for everything.

​"The best online class I’ve taken so far! Everything was explained so simply that it made the subject very easy to learn. I loved the layout of the course and the clear examples. I would highly recommend this to anyone looking for a high-quality learning experience."

I want to mention that the staff and the teachers were amazing and Edus is one of the best insituations my childrens have ever been and congratulations and keep it up on your milestone. But there is one change I recommend can you extend the deadline of the fees need to pay in the situations like the Ditwah storm.
